title: Toolhouse List Agents - Example Response
description: Example response from GET /me/agents showing a list of deployed AI agents.

body.name: Customer Support Assistant
body.description: An AI agent that handles customer support queries using internal knowledge base.
body.systemPrompt: You are a helpful customer support assistant. Use the available tools to look up account information and resolve customer issues efficiently.

body.name: Daily Report Generator
body.description: Generates and emails a daily business metrics report every morning.
body.systemPrompt: You are a business analyst assistant. Each morning, compile the daily metrics report from connected data sources and send it to the team.
